heading: Regulations
label: 3124 Regulations
text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations as are necessary and appropriate to carry out his responsibilities under this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1997—, which directed amendment of section by inserting “, and the State at any time the State has complied with ” after “The Secretary” and inserting at end “During any time that the State has complied with , the Secretary shall not make or enforce regulations implementing section 3115(a), (b), or (c) of this title.”, was repealed by . See Effective and Termination Dates of 1997 Amendment note below.Pub. L. 105–83, § 316(b)(8)section 3115(d) of this titlesection 3115(d) of this titlePub. L. 105–83, § 316(d)

Effective and Termination Dates of 1997 AmendmentUntil laws are adopted in Alaska which provide for definition, preference, and participation specified in sections 3113 to 3115 of this title, amendment by was effective only for purpose of determining whether State’s laws provide for such definition, preference, and participation, and such amendment was repealed on , because such laws had not been adopted, see set out as a note under .Pub. L. 105–83section 316(d) of Pub. L. 105–83section 3102 of this titleDec. 1, 1998
